Eyewear as it should feel — North Nazimabad, Karachi

See the world through better frames.

A curated eyewear boutique where premium frames meet expert eye care. No clinics, no queues — just the right pair, fitted perfectly.

Explore Frames Book an Eye Test
Oliver Peoples Leica Gentle Monster Warby Parker

Featured Frames

Frames worth wearing every day.

Each pair is chosen for its craft, comfort, and character — presented the way it deserves.

Optical Oliver Peoples

Aurora Round

Hand-finished acetate with a soft circular silhouette. A quiet statement for everyday wear.

From PKR 38,000

Optical Leica

Meridian Square

Precision-engineered titanium frames with a confident rectangular profile and featherweight feel.

From PKR 52,000

Sunglasses Gentle Monster

Lumen Aviator

Sculptural aviators with gradient lenses. Editorial, bold, unmistakably modern.

From PKR 44,000

Optical Warby Parker

Atlas Clear

Clean lines, crisp acetate, and a universally flattering keyhole bridge.

From PKR 29,000

Sunglasses Oliver Peoples

Noir Cat-Eye

A refined cat-eye in deep acetate. Retro confidence, contemporary comfort.

From PKR 41,000

Optical Leica

Vista Rimless

Nearly weightless rimless construction with anti-glare coated lenses.

From PKR 58,000

Featured Brands

The houses we choose to carry.

A small, considered roster of the world's most respected eyewear makers.

Oliver Peoples

California craft, heritage detailing.

USA

Leica

Optical precision, engineered to last.

Germany

Gentle Monster

Sculptural, bold, editorial.

South Korea

Warby Parker

Accessible design, home-try-on.

USA

Lens Technology

The lens does the seeing.

We pair every frame with precision-ground lenses and coatings engineered for how you actually live — work, drive, and wander.

Talk to a specialist

Blue Light Filter

Soften screen fatigue with lenses tuned for long days at the desk.

Anti-Reflective Coating

Crisp, glare-free vision and clearer photos — no window glare.

Photochromic

Lenses that adapt from clear indoors to tinted in sunlight.

High-Index Thin

Strong prescriptions, beautifully slim and light profiles.

Polarised Sun

Cut glare on water and road for true, comfortable colour.

Scratch Shield

A durable hard coat that keeps lenses looking new, longer.

Eye Testing

A proper eye test, without the wait.

Our optometrists take the time most clinics don't. Thorough, calm, and explained in plain language — so your prescription is exactly right.

01

Eye Testing

Comprehensive, unhurried vision assessments with certified optometrists.

02

Prescription Glasses

Precision-ground lenses paired with the frame of your choice.

03

Lens Replacement

Refresh your favourite frames with new, upgraded lenses.

04

Frame Adjustment

Expert fitting and adjustments for all-day comfort.

05

Contact Lens Consultation

Personalised fitting and guidance for first-time and experienced wearers.

Why Choose Us

A boutique, not a checklist.

Curated, not crowded

A tight edit of frames we would wear ourselves — no endless racks, no noise.

Fitted by hand

Every pair is adjusted in-store until it sits exactly right. Comfort is the product.

Honest advice

We tell you what suits your face and life — not what costs the most.

Crafted lenses

Precision-ground optics with coatings matched to how you use your eyes.

Testimonials

What Karachi wears.

Store Information

Come try them on.

Walk in, or book a quiet slot with our optometrist. Either way, leave with frames that feel like they were made for you.
